description: Audio, image, camera, photo and media capabilities. Extend with camera/photo library mappings as needed.

permission.notes: TTS engine availability and voice selection differ.

manifest.notes: Add audio-related configuration only if required by selected Kit.

implementation_notes: Keep current item index and item state in store to drive UI.
Do not bind UI directly to platform TTS object.
capabilities.fallback: Show textual briefing list if TTS engine is unavailable.
